news.paragraph: Microsoft is seeing positive momentum following an upgrade from Phillip Securities to a "Buy" rating with a price target of $485. While some analysts have expressed caution, other recent reports highlight strong fundamental reasons to favor the company. No immediate earnings or regulatory catalysts are explicitly noted in these headlines, though market discussions continue regarding software pricing evolution and industry competition.
headlines: Phillip Securities Upgrades Microsoft to Buy From Accumulate, Price Target is $485
MSFT, DELL And Intel: Which Is The Better Buy
